function.content:
---
record_type: bill
bill_id: bill.window_farm_starter_tray
alias: window_farm_starter_tray
purchased_on: 2026-04-14
total_eur: 27
counterparty: Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien
project: Window Farm Notes
related_entity: Oskar Novak
lines:
  - item: self-watering tray
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 19
    line_eur: 19
  - item: herb seed packets
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 8
    line_eur: 8
---
# Herb tray and seed starter order

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | bill                          |
| bill_id        | bill.window_farm_starter_tray |
| alias          | window_farm_starter_tray      |
| purchased_on   | 2026-04-14                    |
| total_eur      | 27                            |
| counterparty   | Grünzeug Gärtnerei Wien       |
| project        | Window Farm Notes             |
| related_entity | Oskar Novak                   |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | self-watering tray | 1   | 19       | 19       |
| 2 | herb seed packets  | 1   | 8        | 8        |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL              |     |          | 27       |
+---+--------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

Small child-friendly garden experiment that matters mostly because it might stick as a care routine.

Workspace search found one matching finance bill, 50_finance/purchases/2026_04_14__eur_000027__bill__window_farm_starter_tray.md, which contained all bill-schema values in its visible body but lacked YAML frontmatter. No other Oskar-related bill was found in purchases.
